description:
Calculate the Spearman rank correlation matrix for the five Openness items (O1, O2, O3, O4, O5) using the loaded BFI25 dataset, including significance reporting and confidence intervals. Create a report file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/spearman_openness_report.txt with the following information based on the results:
- Line 1: 'O1_O2: <value>' (Spearman rho for O1 and O2, 3 decimal places)
- Line 2: 'O2_O5: <value>' (Spearman rho for O2 and O5, 3 decimal places)
- Line 3: 'O4_O5: <value>' (Spearman rho for O4 and O5, 3 decimal places)
- Line 4: 'strongest_pair: <Ox_Oy>' (e.g., O1_O2)
- Line 5: 'strongest_rho: <value>' (3 decimal places)
- Line 6: 'weakest_pair: <Ox_Oy>' (e.g., O3_O4)
- Line 7: 'weakest_rho: <value>' (3 decimal places)
- Line 8: 'num_significant: <count>' (Count of unique pairs with p < 0.05 out of the 10 pairs)
